message:
feat(cli/robot,server/tui): extend malformed-attachments sentinel to robot output + TUI attachment/message/thread views

Continuation of the earlier "shared malformed-JSON sentinels"
work in this batch.  Four more call sites were still doing
`serde_json::from_str::<...>(attachments_json).unwrap_or_default()`
and silently dropping the attachment list on corruption.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-cli/src/robot.rs

- Define MALFORMED_ATTACHMENTS_SENTINEL as a file-local const
  (can't import the tool_util constant here — circular
  dependency between cli and tools crates).
- New helper parse_attachment_values(Option<&str>) ->
  Vec<serde_json::Value>:
    - None or empty → Vec::new()
    - Valid JSON array → the parsed array
    - Parse error → single-element sentinel payload
  Same contract as tool_util::parse_attachment_metadata_json.
- The robot output formatters that walk attachments now go
  through parse_attachment_values, so corrupted rows surface
  a `[malformed-attachments-json]` marker rather than appearing
  as empty attachment lists.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-server/src/tui_screens/attachments.rs

- The TUI attachments panel previously called
  `serde_json::from_str::<Vec<serde_json::Value>>(...).unwrap_or_default()`
  inside its row loader and the attachment count header.
- Switch to the same local helper (this crate has its own
  copy for the same circular-dep reason).  The TUI now renders
  a `[malformed-attachments-json]` row with a distinctive
  color (warn-amber) when the underlying JSON is broken, so
  operators can tell "this row has no attachments" from
  "this row's attachments are corrupt".

crates/mcp-agent-mail-server/src/tui_screens/messages.rs
crates/mcp-agent-mail-server/src/tui_screens/threads.rs

- Both screens render message rows that include an attachment
  count column derived from parsing attachments_json.  Both
  routes now go through the same helper so the count is
  "1 (malformed)" instead of "0" on corrupted rows.
- Messages screen: add the same treatment to the per-row
  expand-panel attachment list.
- Threads screen: the thread-summary attachment rollup uses
  the helper before counting across the thread's messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
